defaultDescription: Score your Guinness pour with AI, share your split, and climb pub, friend, and weekly leaderboards.
ogDefaultImageAlt: Split The G wordmark on a dark branded background

root.title: Split The G
root.description: Score your Guinness pour with AI, share your split, and climb pub, friend, and weekly leaderboards.

home.title: Split the G Scorer
home.description: Snap your pint and get an AI Split the G score in seconds.
home.keywords: split the g scorer|guinness score app|pour analyzer

feed.title: Live Feed
feed.description: Browse recent Split the G pours, scores, and pub activity.
feed.keywords: split the g feed|recent guinness pours

pubs.title: Pubs
pubs.description: Find pubs, compare average pour ratings, and open each pub wall.
pubs.keywords: guinness pubs|pub leaderboard|split the g pubs

pubDetail.title: Pub Details
pubDetail.description: View a pub profile, map, and latest Split the G pours for that venue.

competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.description: Create or join Split the G competitions with friends and live leaderboards.
competitions.keywords: split the g competitions|guinness challenge|friends leaderboard

competitionDetail.title: Competition Details
competitionDetail.description: Track standings, participants, and recent pours for this Split the G competition.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your Split the G profile, progress, scores, favorites, expenses, and friends.
profile.keywords: split the g profile|pour progress|friends leaderboard

account.title: Account
account.description: Update your display name, leaderboard nickname, country flag, and sign-in for Split the G.

progress.title: Profile Progress
progress.description: Track average score trends, best pours, and friend progress in Split the G.

expenses.title: Profile Expenses
expenses.description: See pint spend totals and price trends from your linked Split the G pours.
expenses.keywords: pint spend|beer expenses|split the g prices

scores.title: Profile Scores
scores.description: Review your recent Split the G results and score history.

favorites.title: Profile Favorite Bars
favorites.description: Save and manage your favorite pubs in Split the G.

friends.title: Profile Friends
friends.description: Manage friend requests and compare your Split the G scores.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Answers about scoring, sharing pours, pubs, competitions, and profile features in Split the G.
faq.keywords: split the g faq|guinness app questions

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: See top Split the G scores across global, local, and friends tabs.
leaderboard.keywords: split the g leaderboard|weekly guinness ranking

wall.title: Wall
wall.description: Explore the Split the G wall of recent pours and scores.
wall.keywords: split the g wall|guinness collage|pour gallery

past24hr.title: Past 24 Hours Leaderboard
past24hr.description: Country rankings for the last 24 hours of Split the G pours.
past24hr.keywords: 24 hour leaderboard|split the g daily ranking

country.title: Country Leaderboard
country.description: All-time country rankings by submission count and average Split the G score.

scoreFallback.title: Pour Result
scoreFallback.description: Open this Split the G pour result and challenge your friends.
scoreFallback.keywords: split the g result|guinness pour score

scoreDetail.title: {scoreValue}/5 Split by {username}
scoreDetail.description: {username} scored {scoreValue}/5 on Split the G. All-time #{allTimeRank} of {totalSplits}, weekly #{weeklyRank} of {weeklyTotalSplits}.
scoreDetail.imageAlt: Guinness pint from {username}'s pour on Split the G
scoreDetail.keywords: split the g score|pour challenge|guinness rating
